analogues.name: CHINA SHOCK
analogues.trigger: China Yuan devaluation EM rout FII exit India gap-down
analogues.map_to: Any EM currency crisis China growth scare BOJ surprise rate hike

analogues.name: DEMONETISATION
analogues.trigger: Overnight surprise domestic policy with no leaks zero advance signal
analogues.map_to: Any unannounced major Indian policy change

analogues.name: NBFC CRISIS
analogues.trigger: Domestic financial system stress slow-burn contagion credit market seizure
analogues.map_to: Banking NBFC liquidity stress events credit market seizures

analogues.name: CORPORATE TAX CUT
analogues.trigger: Unscheduled positive fiscal surprise press conference FM
analogues.map_to: Emergency fiscal stimulus unscheduled positive policy

analogues.name: COVID CASCADE
analogues.trigger: Pandemic plus global lockdown simultaneous economic shutdown
analogues.map_to: Global simultaneous economic halt pandemic declaration

analogues.name: BOLD BUDGET
analogues.trigger: Budget massively exceeds expectations infrastructure privatisation
analogues.map_to: Strong fiscal surprise bold infra or tax relief announcement

analogues.name: UKRAINE INVASION
analogues.trigger: Military invasion crude spike EM selloff
analogues.map_to: Any major military conflict crude supply shock Hormuz threat

analogues.name: FED RATE SHOCK
analogues.trigger: Hot CPI aggressive Fed pivot EM capital flight
analogues.map_to: Surprise hawkish central bank pivot inflation shock above consensus

analogues.name: ELECTION SHOCK
analogues.trigger: Ruling party significantly underperforms exit polls coalition risk
analogues.map_to: Any political continuity disruption coalition government formation

analogues.name: TRUMP TARIFFS
analogues.trigger: Announced trade war India directly impacted China retaliates
analogues.map_to: Protectionist US trade actions bilateral tariff escalation

analogues.name: FED CUT CYCLE
analogues.trigger: First Fed rate cut after hiking cycle larger than expected
analogues.map_to: Major central bank dovish pivot global liquidity expansion

analogues.name: IRAN WAR SUSTAINED
analogues.trigger: Prolonged military conflict sustained crude elevation FII exodus
analogues.map_to: Any Gulf conflict threatening Hormuz crude supply chain

analogues.name: CEASEFIRE RELIEF
analogues.trigger: Announced geopolitical de-escalation oil supply threat removed
analogues.map_to: Any resolution of active military conflict trade war pause
